description: Behavior evals check that when fired the skill: refuses if integration tests have not passed, runs per-repo reviews before the cross-repo pass, runs a security-review pass per worktree and surfaces Critical security findings before proceeding (Security findings section in REVIEW.md), surfaces a per-repo BLOCK immediately before proceeding to cross-repo, checks the four cross-repo dimensions (contract drift, observability, error parity, serialization), sets review_approved: false and pauses for human approval, and requires explicit 'approved' before advancing.

cases.prompt: Review this feature for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json shows phase: integration_test and phase_status: failed. Two services: order-service and payment-service. Describe what you do.

Review this feature for PROJ-1234. Integration tests passed. Two services: order-service and payment-service. Describe the order of operations — when do you run the per-repo reviews versus the cross-repo pass?

You are running cross-service-review for PROJ-1234. Both per-repo reviews have finished: order-service is BLOCK (2 Critical findings), payment-service is PASS. What message do you show the user, and do you proceed to the cross-repo pass?
Review this feature for PROJ-1234. Integration tests passed. Per-repo reviews both PASS. Now describe what the cross-repo reviewer subagent specifically looks for.

Review this feature for PROJ-1234. Integration tests passed. All per-repo reviews PASS. Cross-repo review returns PASS (no Critical findings). Describe the feature-state.json update you make and whether you automatically advance to the next phase.

Cross-service review for PROJ-1234 is complete. You have set review_approved: false and told the user to reply to proceed. The user responds with a thumbs-up emoji 👍. Describe your response and what exact input you are waiting for before advancing.

Review this feature for PROJ-1234. Integration tests passed. Per-repo reviews both PASS. Two services: order-service and payment-service. Describe the security pass you run before the cross-repo review and what it contributes to REVIEW.md.

must_not_contain_in_output: security is covered by the per-repo review

cases.prompt: You are running cross-service-review for PROJ-1234. Integration tests passed and per-repo reviews are PASS. The security-review pass on order-service returns 1 Critical finding (missing authorization on DELETE /api/orders/{id}). Do you proceed to the cross-repo pass, and what is the overall verdict?
